titleStmt.title: SII 9.211: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 211. (A.R. No. 97 of 1904.) ON THE 13TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 51, Parābhava, Jyēshṭha, amāvāsye, Ādivāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1126 June 22 Tuesday (not Sunday as stated), when there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. A certain Gujjara-Sāntikabbe of Vishṇuvṛiddha-gōtra is said to have made a gift of a garden for the service of the god Kalidēva and of a house for the residence of the Purāṇa-reader, after washing the feet of Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita, in the presence of the Mahājanas of Bāḷguḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivridhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
manneyakeṟeya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire © tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśābaradyumaṇi su
bhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rāji
gacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādisama
stapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamallapāṇḍya
dēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisi
ṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti yamaniyama
svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇapārāyaṇajapasamā
dhisakaḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahāraṁ
bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁbara sanni
dhānadoḷu © śrīcāḷukyavikramavarṣada 51 neya parābhavasaṁvatsa
rada jyēṣṭhadamāvāsye Ādivāraṁ sūryyagrahaṇaṁ byatīpātaṁ kūḍalu
dibyaliṁga śrīsvayaṁbhukaliḍēvasvāmidēvara nivēdyakke sakaḷagu
ṇasaṁpannarappa śrīviṣṇuvriddhagōtrada gujjara sāṁtikabbe svasti
yamaniyamādisakaḷaguṇasivāgamajñānasaṁpanna
rappa śrīmatsivaśaktipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrbbaka(ṁ)mmāḍi tanna go
ravareḍevaṇiya mūvattu kamma tōṁṭamaṁ biṭṭaḷsi
ṟilagēriya maneya tanniṁdaṁ parōkṣadalu dēvara maneyalu purāṇaṁ
bēḷva Upādhyāyarirppaṁtāgi biṭṭaḷī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge pra
yāgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradoḷsāsirbbarvvēdapāragargge sāsira
kavileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷidavarā puṇya
sthānadoḷanitumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . svaṁ dātātsumahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhamanyatra pālanaṁ .
dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānātśrēyōnupālanāt . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī ©
Digital edition of SII 9.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
